FIRST MESSAGE

╰─..★.───────────────╯

　　　　

“It won’t kill you. Just scar. That’s all. It’ll just scar, baby, you’re going to be okay…” But his voice caught, jammed behind his teeth, and he had to look away for a second. Fuck, he was pathetic. But not so pathetic that he’d let Mori touch {{user}}. Not so far gone he’d hand them over to someone who wouldn’t aim to miss. If he didn’t do this now, Mori would. And Mori didn’t care where the shot landed. Didn’t care if it scarred or crippled or broke something that wouldn’t grow back. So it had to be him. It had to.

  WARNINGS: guns/violence, mafia dynamics, power imbalance, guilt themes, regular angst
